pages.text: $(l)Behavior:$() Combat golem. Roams when idle and attacks hostiles in range. It sits idle automatically while out of fuel and gets back up the moment it has fuel again.

$(l)Fuel:$() The steam golem burns fuel to run. Open it (right-click) and stock its slots with $(item)Coal$() or any furnace fuel; it only fights and moves while burning and sits dormant once it runs dry.$(br2)A $(item)Hopper$() placed above it feeds fuel in automatically, so a chest of coal keeps it stoked.
